title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 214.508 - Previous cemetery owner liable, when
text:
214.508.  Previous cemetery owner liable, when. — Any cemetery operator who purchases a cemetery from a city shall not be held liable or responsible for any conditions existing or actions taken which occurred prior to the cemetery operator's purchase from such city; except that, the exemption provided in this section shall not relieve any previous owner or wrongdoer for their actions related to such cemetery.
(L. 1997 H.B. 592 § 3 merged with S.B. 58 § 3, A.L. 2010 H.B. 1692, et al. merged with H.B. 2226, et al. merged with S.B. 754)
